abilities.name: Wild Growth
abilities.effect: Each Basic {G} Energy attached to all of your Pokémon provides {G}{G} Energy. The effect of Wild Growth doesn't stack.

attacks.name: Bring Down
attacks.effect: Choose a Pokémon in play (yours or your opponent's) that has the least HP remaining, except for this Pokémon, and it is Knocked Out.

attacks.name: Water Shot
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy from this Pokémon.

abilities.name: Psychic Draw
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, when you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon, you may use this Ability. Draw 3 cards.

attacks.name: Powerful Hand
attacks.effect: Place 2 damage counters on your opponent's Active Pokémon for each card in your hand.

abilities.name: Lunar Cycle
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, if you have Solrock in play, you may discard a Basic {F} Energy card from your hand in order to use this Ability. Draw 3 cards. You can't use more than 1 Lunar Cycle Ability each turn.

attacks.name: Pull
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, switch 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon with their Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Disruptive Wind
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Balloon Return
attacks.effect: Put this Pokémon and all attached cards into your hand.

abilities.name: Damp
abilities.effect: Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) lose all Abilities that require those Pokémon to be Knocked Out.

abilities.name: Damp
abilities.effect: Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) lose all Abilities that require those Pokémon to be Knocked Out.

attacks.name: Hydro Pump
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each {W} Energy attached to this Pokémon.

abilities.name: Psychic Draw
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, when you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon, you may use this Ability. Draw 3 cards.

attacks.name: Powerful Hand
attacks.effect: Place 2 damage counters on your opponent's Active Pokémon for each card in your hand.

attacks.name: Accelerating Stab
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Accelerating Stab.

attacks.name: Strafe
attacks.effect: You may switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Illusory Impulse
attacks.effect: Discard all Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Aura Jab
attacks.effect: Attach up to 3 Basic {F} Energy cards from your discard pile to your Benched Pokémon in any way you like.

attacks.name: Mega Brave
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Mega Brave.

abilities.name: Solar Transfer
abilities.effect: As often as you like during your turn, you may use this Ability. Move a Basic {G} Energy from 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Jungle Dump
attacks.effect: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Infernal Slash
attacks.effect: Discard 4 Basic {R} Energy cards from your hand. If you can't discard 4 cards in this way, this attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Limit Break
attacks.effect: If your opponent has 3 or fewer Prize cards remaining, this attack does 90 more damage.

abilities.name: Sandy Flapping
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, when you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon, you may use this Ability. You may also use this Ability if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot and is Knocked Out by damage from an attack from your opponent's Pokémon. Discard the top 2 cards of your opponent's deck.

abilities.name: Sinister Surge
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may use this Ability. Search your deck for a Basic {D} Energy card and attach it to 1 of your Benched {D} Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck. If you attached Energy to a Pokémon in this way, place 2 damage counters on that Pokémon.

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.effect: Draw a card.

attacks.name: Healing Fluff
attacks.effect: Heal all damage from 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: U-turn
attacks.effect: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Retaliatory Claw
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon's remaining HP is 50 or less, this attack does 170 more damage.

attacks.name: Gather Strength
attacks.effect: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Energy cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Inferno X
attacks.effect: Discard any amount of [R] Energy from among your Pokémon, and this attack does 90 damage for each card you discarded in this way.

abilities.name: Excited Turbo
abilities.effect: As often as you like during your turn, if you have any {R} Mega Evolution Pokémon ex in play, you may use this Ability. Attach a Basic {R} Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Benched {R} Pokémon.

abilities.name: Run Errand
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may use this Ability. Draw 2 cards. You can't use more than 1 Run Errand Ability each turn.

attacks.name: Rapid-Fire Combo
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 50 more damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Soothing Melody
attacks.effect: Heal 120 damage from 1 of your Benched {P} Pokémon.

name: Celebratory Fanfare
effect: Once during each player's turn, that player may heal 10 damage from each of their Pokémon. If a player healed any damage in this way, their turn ends.

attacks.name: Inferno X
attacks.effect: Discard any amount of [R] Energy from among your Pokémon, and this attack does 90 damage for each card you discarded in this way.

attacks.name: Explosion Y
attacks.effect: Discard 3 Energy from this Pokémon, and this attack does 280 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Shred
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Rampaging Thunder
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use attacks.

attacks.name: Overflowing Wishes
attacks.effect: For each of your Benched Pokémon, search your deck for a Basic {P} Energy card and attach it to that Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Mega Symphonia
attacks.effect: This attack does 50 damage for each {P} Energy attached to all of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Aura Jab
attacks.effect: Attach up to 3 Basic {F} Energy cards from your discard pile to your Benched Pokémon in any way you like.

attacks.name: Mega Brave
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Mega Brave.

attacks.name: Giant Bouquet
attacks.effect: This attack does 50 more damage for each {G} Energy attached to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Crimson Blast
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 60 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Mortal Crunch
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon already has any damage counters on it, this attack does 200 more damage.

attacks.name: Leech Seed
attacks.effect: Heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Ember
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Bubble
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Fury Swipes
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Fire Fang
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Disarming Voice
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Regal Command
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage for each of your Pokémon in play.

attacks.name: Solar Coiling
attacks.effect: If Rosa's Encouragement is in your discard pile, this attack does 150 more damage.

abilities.name: Stone Arms
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may use this Ability. Attach a Basic {F} Energy card from your hand to 1 of your {F} Pokémon.

abilities.name: Tyrannically Gutsy
abilities.effect: If this Pokémon has any Special Energy attached, it gets +150 HP.

attacks.name: Wreak Havoc
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. For each heads, discard the top card of your opponent's deck.

attacks.name: Weaponized Swords
attacks.effect: Reveal any number of Honedge, Doublade, and Aegislash from your hand, and this attack does 60 damage for each card you revealed in this way.

attacks.name: Get Angry
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.
